meta.title: Special Representatives Brian Hook and Elliott Abrams on the Evolving Tehran-Caracas Relationship
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with Special Representative for Iran Brian Hook and Special Representative for Venezuela Elliott Abrams on the evolving relationship between Tehran and Caracas. Hudson Senior Fellow Nadia Schadlow will moderate the event.
